description: Integrated fail-closed campaign covering GK, EM, production-scale runtime, DREAM, Aurora/STRAHL, and free-boundary blockers.

next_required_evidence: public nonlinear GENE/CGYRO/GS2 benchmark deck parity
production-scale radial/toroidal domain decomposition and convergence evidence
Maxwell field solve parity beyond compact A_parallel contract
validated flux spectra, zonal-flow, and saturation parity against production GK outputs

sources.required_action: Acquire redistribution-permitted nonlinear 5D GENE benchmark decks and output artifacts, then map heat flux, zonal flow, saturation, and electromagnetic observables into the full-fidelity artifact schema.
Acquire public CGYRO nonlinear electromagnetic benchmark inputs and outputs, preserve provenance/license metadata, and compare against native 5D nonlinear GK artifacts.
Acquire GS2 nonlinear benchmark decks and output artifacts, then gate native nonlinear GK heat-flux spectra and field-energy histories against declared thresholds.

next_required_evidence: native nonlinear Ampere/Faraday closure beyond compact A_parallel/B_parallel contracts
GENE/CGYRO/GS2 electromagnetic field-energy and transport parity artifacts

sources.required_action: Acquire redistribution-permitted nonlinear 5D GENE benchmark decks and output artifacts, then map heat flux, zonal flow, saturation, and electromagnetic observables into the full-fidelity artifact schema.
Acquire public CGYRO nonlinear electromagnetic benchmark inputs and outputs, preserve provenance/license metadata, and compare against native 5D nonlinear GK artifacts.
Acquire GS2 nonlinear benchmark decks and output artifacts, then gate native nonlinear GK heat-flux spectra and field-energy histories against declared thresholds.

next_required_evidence: radial/toroidal domain decomposition implementation
multi-GPU or cluster scaling reports on production-size grids
large-grid warm GPU throughput and convergence evidence
public DREAM deck ingestion and production artifact parity
full momentum-pitch-radius Fokker-Planck evolution rather than 1D momentum projection artifact
validated synchrotron, bremsstrahlung, partial-screening, and transport operators against DREAM
distribution-function, current, and growth-rate RMSE thresholds against public DREAM output

sources.required_action: Ingest DREAM example or publication decks, run or acquire kinetic outputs, and map f_p_xi_t, runaway current, avalanche growth, synchrotron, bremsstrahlung, and partial-screening observables into the full-fidelity artifact schema.

next_required_evidence: public Aurora/STRAHL artifact ingestion and production parity
licensed ADAS/Open-ADAS coefficient ingestion rather than parametric ADAS-style coefficients
validated charge-state transport, recycling, and radiation operators against Aurora/STRAHL
charge-state density, total-density, and radiation RMSE thresholds against public outputs

sources.required_action: Ingest Aurora impurity transport examples and ADAS-backed outputs, then compare charge-state densities, total density, line radiation, ionisation, and recombination source/sink matrices.

next_required_evidence: public coil-current sidecars or machine coil metadata for GEQDSK rows
strict FreeGS backend convergence on public free-boundary cases
profile-source/free-boundary reconstruction parity artifacts

sources.required_action: Ingest FreeGS free-boundary coil-current examples, run strict backend comparisons, and preserve coil, limiter, X-point, and GEQDSK provenance.
Ingest evolutive free-boundary examples with machine coil metadata for strict native coil/vacuum reconstruction comparisons.
